mapper.sql: id, activity_id, product_id, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into activity_product (id, activity_id, product_id, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into activity_product
id,
activity_id,
product_id,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update activity_product
activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update activity_product set activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into activity_product (id, activity_id, product_id, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into activity_product (id, activity_id, product_id, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}

insert into activity_product
id,
activity_id,
product_id,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
values
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
product_id = #{productId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.select: select activity_product.product_id, product.product_code, product.product_name, product.sale_price, sp.quantity, sp.up_down, concat((select name from product_category where id = product.category_class_one), '>', (select name from product_category where id = product.category_class_two), '>', (select name from product_category where id = product.category_class_three), '>', (select name from product_category where id = product.category_class_four)) as category_class_name from activity_product inner join product on activity_product.product_id = product.id inner join store_product sp on product.id = sp.product_id and sp.store_id = #{storeId,jdbcType=BIGINT} where activity_product.activity_id = #{activityId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
